English: Until our next meeting.
Be careful on your way.

Hiligaynon: Amen, Dios mag-upod sa aton tanan.
English: Amen, God be with us all.
We are going to the capitol tomorrow.

Hiligaynon: Sin-o ang kapitan sang inyo barangay?
English: Who is the captain of your barangay?

Hiligaynon: Nagpirma sia sang kasulatan sa abogado.
English: He/She signed a document with the lawyer.

Hiligaynon: May ara kami sing sinapol sa plasa.
English: We have a meeting at the plaza.
Do not violate the law.
We need to pay taxes.

Hiligaynon: Diin dampi ang opisina sang mayor?
English: Where is the mayor's office located?
I have already obtained a community tax certificate.
My neighbor has a complaint.

Hiligaynon: Nag-atubang sila sa lupon sang barangay.
English: They faced the barangay mediation board.

Hiligaynon: Isulat ang imo panaksi sa papel.
English: Write your testimony on the paper.

Hiligaynon: Indi mag-obra sing kinagula sa banwa.
English: Do not cause a disturbance in town.
Respect the rights of others.

Hiligaynon: Pila ang multa sa sining sala?
English: How much is the fine for this offense?
The thief was caught by the police.

Hiligaynon: Priso na sia sa sulod sang karsel.
English: He/She is already imprisoned inside the jail.
Let us help each other for peace.
Our officials are hardworking.
When is the day of the election?

Hiligaynon: Botante na ako sa sining banwa.
English: I am already a voter in this town.
Do not sell your vote.

Hiligaynon: Matuod gid ang ginasiling sang saksi.
English: What the witness says is really true.

Hiligaynon: Pataura ang imo ihibalo sa laye.
English: Sharpen your knowledge of the law.

Hiligaynon: Ambot kon sin-o ang naghimo sang sala.
English: I don't know who committed the offense.

Hiligaynon: Ako ang nag-ako sang akon kakulangan.
English: I admitted my shortcoming.
Forgive me for my violation.
Yes, I forgive you already.

Hiligaynon: Kabay pa nga indi na ini maliwat.
English: I hope this won't happen again.

Hiligaynon: Salamat sa imo daku nga pasensya.
English: Thank you for your great patience.

Hiligaynon: Wala na sing gamo sa amon lugar.
English: There is no more trouble in our place.
We are happy in our living.
Let's all get along as citizens.
Our companionship is very good.

Hiligaynon: Kabay pa nga mag-uswag ang aton banwa.
English: I hope our town prospers.
Amen, everything will be well.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka tuig ang termino sang mayor?
English: How many years is the mayor's term?

Hiligaynon: Tatlo ka tuig ang tagsa ka termino.
English: Each term is three years long.

Hiligaynon: Kinahanglan naton sing lisensya sa pag-obra.
English: We need a license to work/operate.

Hiligaynon: Ipakita ang imo dokumento sa guard.
English: Show your documents to the guard.
The office is open from eight o'clock.
They are already closed in the afternoon.

Hiligaynon: Husto gid ang imo gindala nga papel.
English: The papers you brought are exactly right.
Put the seal at the bottom.
Accept this certificate of recognition.
Thank you very much for your service.

Hiligaynon: Wala ina sing kabilinggan sa amon.
English: That is of no concern to us.
Be careful on your way home.

Hiligaynon: Dal-a ining balita sa inyo pamilya.
English: Take this news to your family.
Our future is bright now.
Justice is wealth.

Hiligaynon: Indi mag-untat sa pagpangita sang kamatuoran.
English: Do not stop searching for the truth.

Hiligaynon: Malayo ang lalakton pakadto sa korte.
English: It is a long walk to the court.

Hiligaynon: Ari na ang desisyon sang huwes.
English: Here is the decision of the judge.
Read the directions carefully.

Hiligaynon: Isulat ang sabat sa tunga sang linya.
English: Write the answer in the middle of the line.

Hiligaynon: Tapos na ang oras sang pagboto.
English: The time for voting is over.

Hiligaynon: Ihatag ang mga balota sa unahan.
English: Pass the ballots to the front.

Hiligaynon: Salamat sa inyo pagpamati sa amon.
English: Thank you for listening to us.

Hiligaynon: Maayong hapon sa inyo tanan diri.
English: Good afternoon to all of you here.

Hiligaynon: Mag-andam kamo sa pagtabok sa dalan.
English: Be careful in crossing the road.

Hiligaynon: Tubtob sa liwat nga pagkitaay naton.
English: Until we see each other again.

Hiligaynon: Maayo gid ang inyo ginpakita subong.
English: What you showed today was very good.
Yes, we will strive even harder.
Amen, the community will be good.
Who signed this agreement?

Hiligaynon: Kami ang nagpirma sa atubang sang saksi.
English: We signed in front of the witness.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka kopya ang kinahanglan naton?
English: How many copies do we need?

Hiligaynon: Duha ka kopya para sa tagsa-tagsa.
English: Two copies for each person.

Hiligaynon: Ibutang ini sa sulod sang sobre.
English: Put this inside the envelope.
Close the envelope properly.
Send this to the post office tomorrow.

Hiligaynon: Tagpila ang selyo pakadto sa Manila?
English: How much is the stamp to Manila?
The arrival of the letter is fast.
Thank you for the fast service.

Hiligaynon: Wala ina sing problema sa amon.
English: That is no problem for us.

Hiligaynon: Mag-andam kamo sa inyo lakat pirme.
English: Always be careful on your way.
Take these documents.

Hiligaynon: Basi malimtan niyo ini sa lamesa.
English: You might forget these on the table.

Hiligaynon: Mapuli na kami sa amon balay.
English: We are going home to our house now.

Hiligaynon: Malipayon kami kay tapos na ini.
English: We are happy because this is finished.
Sleep well now.

Hiligaynon: Bugtaw kita sa kasanagon sang aga.
English: We will wake up at the crack of dawn.

Hiligaynon: Mag-obra kita para sa aton banwa.
English: Let us work for our town.

Hiligaynon: Ang Dios mag-upod sa aton tanan.
English: God be with us all.
Our destination is very good.
Do not stop helping each other.
Our future is bright.

Hiligaynon: Ginasiling ko sa inyo ang kamatuoran.
English: I am telling you the truth.

Hiligaynon: Magpati kamo sa akon mga hambal.
English: Believe in my words.

Hiligaynon: Indi gid ako magbutig sa inyo.
English: I will never lie to you.
I don't know when this will end.
Who made this plan?

Hiligaynon: Ako ang naghimo sini para sa inyo.
English: I made this for you.

Hiligaynon: Pasayluha ako kon may sala ako.
English: Forgive me if I have a mistake.
Yes, everything is forgiven.

Hiligaynon: Salamat sa inyo daku nga pasensya.
English: Thank you for your great patience.

Hiligaynon: Kabay pa nga magdugay ining kalinong.
English: I hope this peace lasts long.

Hiligaynon: Paalam na sa inyo tanan subong.
English: Farewell to all of you for now.

Hiligaynon: Tubtob sa liwat naton nga pagkitaay.
English: Until our next meeting.
Be careful on your way.
Amen, God be with us.

Hiligaynon: Malayo pa bala ang inyo banwa?
English: Is your town still far?
We are almost there.

Hiligaynon: Diin dampi ang paradahan sang bus?
English: Where is the bus terminal located?

Hiligaynon: Pila ang plete pakadto sa syudad?
English: How much is the fare to the city?
Get on the jeepney now.

Hiligaynon: Para diri lang sa kanto, palihog.
English: Just here at the corner, please.

Hiligaynon: Dasig ang dalagan sang sining sa-salakyan.
English: This vehicle is running fast.

Hiligaynon: Mahina ang lakat sang trapiko subong.
English: The traffic is moving slowly right now.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka oras ang byahe sa barko?
English: How many hours is the trip by boat?

Hiligaynon: Malapad ang suba nga aton tabukon.
English: The river we are crossing is wide.
The bank of the creek is high.

Hiligaynon: Kadto kita sa putok-putokan sang bukid.
English: Let’s go to the peak of the mountain.
The view in the plains is beautiful.
The road has many curves.
The road is slippery when it rains.

Hiligaynon: Dal-a ang imo mapa kag kompas.
English: Bring your map and compass.

Hiligaynon: Sin-o ang drayber sang sining trak?
English: Who is the driver of this truck?

Hiligaynon: May lisensya ka bala sa pagmaneho?
English: Do you have a license to drive?

Hiligaynon: Ipakita ang imo ticket sa konduktor.
English: Show your ticket to the conductor.
When is the next trip?
The departure is at ten in the morning.

Hiligaynon: Naguba ang makina sang amon de-motor.
English: Our motorized boat’s engine broke.
Fix the wheel of the bicycle.

Hiligaynon: Pila ka litro nga gasolina ang kinahanglan?
English: How many liters of gasoline are needed?

Hiligaynon: Puno na ang tanan nga lingkuranan.
English: All the seats are already full.

Hiligaynon: Wala na sing lugar para sa bagahe.
English: There is no more room for luggage.

Hiligaynon: Ibutang ang imo bag sa idalom.
English: Put your bag underneath.

Hiligaynon: Hawid ka sing maayo sa kawayan.
English: Hold on tightly to the bamboo.
Do not crowd/push against others.
The wind from the window is cold.

Hiligaynon: Mainit gid ang byahe kon udto.
English: The trip is very hot at noon.
Where is the nearest gas station?

Hiligaynon: May bintana bala sa inyo barko?
English: Is there a window in your boat?

Hiligaynon: Madalom ang dagat sa sining binit.
English: The sea is deep on this side.

Hiligaynon: Mababaw lang ang tubig sa baybay.
English: The water at the shore is shallow.

Hiligaynon: Sunda lang ining banas pakadto sa uma.
English: Just follow this trail to the farm.

Hiligaynon: Nagtalang kami sa tunga sang kagulangan.
English: We got lost in the middle of the forest.

Hiligaynon: Pamangkuton naton ang tawo sa dalan.
English: Let's ask the person on the road.

Hiligaynon: Husto gid ang ginasiling sang mapa.
English: What the map says is exactly right.
Thank you for showing the way.

Hiligaynon: Wala ina sing problema sa amon.
English: That is no problem for us.
Be careful in crossing.
Brake if someone is passing.

Hiligaynon: Masanag ang mga suga sa dalan.
English: The street lights are bright.
The alleyway at the back is dark.
How many kilometers is the distance?

Hiligaynon: Isá ka oras ang lakat kon madasig.
English: It’s a one-hour walk if fast.

Hiligaynon: Kapoy na ang akon batiis sa lakat.
English: My calves are tired from walking.

Hiligaynon: Pahuway anay kita sa idalom sang puno.
English: Let’s rest for a while under the tree.

Hiligaynon: Inom ka sang tubig halin sa pitser.
English: Drink water from the pitcher.

Hiligaynon: Namit ang hangin diri sa ibabaw.
English: The air here at the top is pleasant.
We are happy upon our arrival.

Hiligaynon: Ari na kami sa amon padulungan.
English: We are now at our destination.

Hiligaynon: Diin mo ginbutang ang amon gamit?
English: Where did you put our things?

Hiligaynon: Isulod ang tanan sa bag-o nga sako.
English: Put everything inside the new sack.
This load of sugar is heavy.
My suitcase is just light.

Hiligaynon: Kabay pa nga mangin maayo ang byahe.
English: I hope the trip will be good.
Amen, thank you for your company.
Let's go together again next time.

Hiligaynon: Pila ang ibayad ko sa imo?
English: How much should I pay you?
Twenty pesos is enough.

Hiligaynon: Ari ang akon plete sa dyip.
English: Here is my jeepney fare.
Accept this small change.

Hiligaynon: Salamat gid sa husto nga pag-isip.
English: Thank you very much for the correct counting.

Hiligaynon: Mag-andam ka pirme sa imo lakat.
English: Always be careful on your way.

Hiligaynon: Dal-a ang imo kapúti basi mag-ulan.
English: Bring your raincoat in case it rains.
The sky is starting to get cloudy.
Let’s go home before it gets dark.

Hiligaynon: Malayo pa ang lalakton pakadto sa balay.
English: The walk to the house is still far.
Quicken your pace now.

Hiligaynon: Ari na ang pultahan sang amon ugsaran.
English: Here is the gate of our yard.

Hiligaynon: Buksi ang kudal para sa karusa.
English: Open the fence for the cart.

Hiligaynon: Malipayon kami kay nakauli na kami.
English: We are happy because we are home.
Let’s rest well now.
Good night to you all.
We will wake up at dawn tomorrow.

Hiligaynon: Mag-obra kita para sa aton pamilya.
English: Let’s work for our family.

Hiligaynon: Ang ihibalo amo ang aton giya.
English: Knowledge is our guide.
Our future is very good.
Do not stop journeying.
Our destination tomorrow is bright.

Hiligaynon: Ginasiling ko sa imo ang kamatuoran.
English: I am telling you the truth.

Hiligaynon: Magpati ka sa akon mga hambal.
English: Believe in my words.

Hiligaynon: Indi gid ako magbutig sa imo.
English: I will never lie to you.

Hiligaynon: Ambot kon san-o pa kita magbalik.
English: I don't know when we will return.

Hiligaynon: Sin-o ang kaupod mo sa biyahe?
English: Who was your companion on the trip?

Hiligaynon: Ako lang isa ang nagbiyahe diri.
English: I was the only one who traveled here.
Forgive me if I was delayed.
Yes, everything is fine.

Hiligaynon: Salamat sa inyo daku nga pasensya.
English: Thank you for your great patience.

Hiligaynon: Kabay pa nga mangin hilway kita.
English: I hope we will be free/safe.
Farewell to you for now.

Hiligaynon: Tubtob sa liwat naton nga pagkitaay.
English: Until our next meeting.
Be careful on your way.
Amen, God be with us.
